title: Infosys to Launch Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions in Düsseldorf
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the launch of the Infosys Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions at its premises in Düsseldorf, Germany, as part of its collaboration with SAP. The lab is intended to help enterprises explore AI and data use cases, co-create tailored SAP-related solutions, and accelerate adoption of offerings including SAP Business AI, SAP Business Data Cloud, RISE with SAP, Infosys Cobalt, and Infosys Topaz. Infosys said solutions from the lab will also be available across its global network of over 12 Living Labs. The announcement supports Infosys’s cloud, AI, and SAP transformation strategy, but does not disclose financial terms, customer commitments, revenue impact, investment amount, or launch economics.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, today announced the launch of the Infosys Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions at Infosys' premises in Düsseldorf, Germany.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys to Launch Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions in Düsseldorf, Germany
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main launch event, location, and Infosys ownership of the lab.

important_text_spans.text: As part of the collaboration between Infosys and SAP, this lab is designed to enable enterprises to explore the limitless possibilities of AI and data, cocreate tailored solutions that address their business challenges, and accelerate the adoption of cuttingedge Infosys and SAP offerings.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys to Launch Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions in Düsseldorf, Germany
important_text_spans.reason: Explains the strategic purpose of the Infosys-SAP collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: Leveraging SAP Business AI, the SAP Business Data Cloud solution, and the RISE with SAP journey, along with Infosys Cobalt, a set of services, solutions and platforms for enterprises to help accelerate their cloud journey, and Infosys Topaz, an AI-first offering using generative AI technologies
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys to Launch Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions in Düsseldorf, Germany
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the key SAP and Infosys offerings tied to the lab.

important_text_spans.text: Solutions from the Enterprise Innovation Lab in Dusseldorf will also be available across Infosys' global network of over 12 Living Labs.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys to Launch Enterprise Innovation Lab for SAP Solutions in Düsseldorf, Germany
important_text_spans.reason: Shows that the lab’s solutions are intended to extend beyond the Düsseldorf site.
